crypto_wallet_type.description: The type of wallet to authenticate. Currently `ethereum` and `solana` are supported. Wallets for any EVM-compatible chains (such as Polygon or BSC) are also supported and are grouped under the `ethereum` type.

crypto_wallet_address.description: The crypto wallet address to authenticate.

user_id.description: The unique ID of a specific User. You may use an `external_id` here if one is set for the user.

session_token.description: The `session_token` associated with a User's existing Session.

session_jwt.description: The `session_jwt` associated with a User's existing Session.

siwe_params.description: The parameters for a Sign In With Ethereum (SIWE) message. May only be passed if the `crypto_wallet_type` is `ethereum`.
